name: Moto X3M 5 Pool Party
author: Poki
description:
Moto X3M 5 Pool Party is a motorbike racing game with "summer" as main theme. This 5th part in the Moto X3M series has 22 new challenging levels. Race your motorbike through pools and beaches and discover all the new obstacles in this sequel in the Moto X3M series. Did you finish all the levels? Also check out the latest Moto X3M Spooky Land 6, the original Moto X3M or any other of our fun motor-jump. Developer and Release Date Moto X3M Pool Party was developed by Madpuffers in March 2019. They are the creators behind the whole Moto X3M series. Tips and Tricks For the best tips and tricks, have a look at our Moto X3M game page description. Here you find how to increase speed, reduce time, and more! How to play Moto X3M Pool Party? This is how you play Moto X3M Pool Party: Use the W or Up Arrow key to speed up Use the S or Down Arrow key to break Use the A and D or Left Arrow and Right Arrow keys to position your motorbike. These keys are crucial for performing front flips and back flips. { "@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "FAQPage", "mainEntity": [ { "@type": "Question", "name": "Developer and Release Date", "acceptedAnswer": { "@type": "Answer", "text": " Moto X3M Pool Party was developed by Madpuffers in March 2019.
